generated_oml:
// C1: Multiplicities
instance MabiMax100FirstAxisDigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Single-instance, centralized digital shadow focused on the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 robot for friction analysis. Scope limited to base axis with no decentralized constellation."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance SINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary physical actuator executing motion commands derived from friction-compensated control algorithms. Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for subtractive manufacturing operations."
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor component providing torque generation (τ_M) based on input current (I_M). Part of the first axis drive system with operational constraints."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission system (gearwheel + cycloidal gearbox) converting motor torque to output torque with friction characteristics. Working range [-90°, 90°], max speed 75°/s."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures input current (I_M) to the permanent magnet synchronous motor for torque derivation (τ_M = k_t * I_M)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft providing angular position data for the motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted behind the gearbox providing gearbox output angle for backlash and elasticity analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagrams (BDD) and Internal Block Diagrams (IBD) describing structural composition of motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox with energy flows."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink/MATLAB model converting input current (I_M) to motor torque (τ_M) using manufacturer-provided motor constants."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionlessGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Ideal dynamics model of the gearbox without friction effects for baseline comparison."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction characteristics for gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing Stribeck effect for gearbox friction characterization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing Dahl's hysteresis model for gearbox dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing LuGre model for detailed gearbox friction behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of input current (I_M) to the motor from MotorCurrentSensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series angular position data from motor encoder (motor shaft)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance MeasuredSecondaryEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series angular position data from secondary encoder (gearbox output)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance DerivedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque (τ_M) calculated from I_M using motor constants."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity (ω) from motor and secondary encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorEncoderData, MeasuredSecondaryEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration from differentiated angular velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedFrictionlessTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox output torque (τ̂_out) without friction effects for comparison."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedMotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedFrictionCompensatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox output torque (τ̂_out) with friction compensation using selected friction model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedMotorTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationProcessingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time MQTT-based streaming protocol for unidirectional sensor data transmission from physical system to digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DataVisualizationService, ModelTraceabilityService
]

instance SimulationProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink/MATLAB environment for processing sensor data through friction models and dynamics simulations."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MultiPhysicsAnalysisService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) framework linking data traces to structural/behavioral models (SysML) for semantic traceability."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelTraceabilityService
]

instance UnifiedDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified visualization dashboard for operational monitoring of friction-related data and insights."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Combines white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models to dynamically estimate friction characteristics (static, kinetic, viscous) in the gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacteristicsInsight, ModelPerformanceInsight, OperationalAnomaliesInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Displays friction-related data (torque, angular velocity, acceleration) in a unified dashboard for operational monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMonitoringInsight
]

instance ModelTraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Links data traces to their sources (sensors, simulations, processing components) via SysML models and Asset Administration Shell (AAS)."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataSourceTraceabilityInsight, ModelValidationInsight
]

instance MultiPhysicsAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Correlates mechanical (torque, angular velocity), electrical (current), and thermal (implied via wear) data for comprehensive friction modeling."
    DTDFVocab:provides MultiPhysicsCorrelationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionCharacteristicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Static, kinetic, and viscous friction coefficients for the gearbox derived from model comparisons."
]

instance ModelPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of white-box vs. black-box model accuracy via deviation analysis between measured and simulated data."
]

instance OperationalAnomaliesInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of wear or unexpected friction behavior via encoder discrepancies and model deviations."
]

instance OperationalMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction-related parameters (torque, velocity, acceleration) for operational oversight."
]

instance DataSourceTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Semantic links between data traces and their sources (sensors, simulations) via Asset Administration Shell."
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of friction models through comparison with physical system behavior and continuous refinement."
]

instance MultiPhysicsCorrelationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Correlation between mechanical, electrical, and thermal effects on friction behavior for comprehensive analysis."
]

instance ControlAlgorithmRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommendations for CNC controller tuning (e.g., PID adjustments) based on friction compensation insights."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ModelRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous refinement of friction models during operation to adapt to wear, tool changes, or environmental factors."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C5: Environment
instance MabiMax100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Operational environment for the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 robot with constraints: working range [-90°, 90°], max speed 75°/s, positional accuracy 0.1 mm."
    base:contains SINUMERIK840DslController, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, CycloidalGearbox,
                 MotorCurrentSensor, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital shadow does **not** push data back to the physical system (PT) as it is a **passive digital shadow** (one-way data flow). However, the insights derived (e.g., friction characteristics) can be **integrated into the CNC controller (SINUMERIK 840D sl)** via **model-based control algorithms** to improve motion accuracy. This interaction is **indirect** and requires additional software components (not detailed in the document)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital shadow operates in **real-time** with **live data streaming** via MQTT. Data traces (e.g., current, angles) are processed with **low-latency requirements** to enable continuous friction model identification. The system does not specify sub-millisecond/millisecond latency but emphasizes **operational synchronization** for dynamic model updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is a **purpose-specific subsystem** within a broader **digital twin ecosystem**. It follows a **modular architecture** where:
  - The **FrictionShadow** class acts as the **identification element** for the DS instance.
  - **Processing components** (e.g., Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB) compute derived data traces.
  - **Data traces** are linked to **sources (sensors, simulations)** and **models (SysML, Simulink)** via **AAS**.
  - The constellation is **orchestrated** around the **first axis of the MABI MAX robot**, with potential for extension to other axes or systems."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow covers the **operational phase** of the physical system, focusing on **as-operated** behavior (real-time friction modeling). It does not explicitly address the **as-designed** or **as-manufactured** phases but relies on **manufacturer-provided parameters** (e.g., motor constants) for initial model calibration. The lifecycle stage is **dynamic**, as the DS adapts to **wear and operational changes** over time."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured through:
  - **Multi-model validation**: Comparison of **simulated (friction-compensated) vs. measured data** to validate friction models.
  - **Traceability**: **AAS** links data traces to their **sources (sensors, simulations)** and **processing steps**, enabling debugging.
  - **Uncertainty quantification**: Discrepancies between **encoder outputs** (motor vs. secondary) are used to infer **elasticity/friction effects**.
  - **Verification**: **Simulink models** are validated against **manufacturer-provided dynamics parameters** and **real-world sensor data**.
  - **Error handling**: The DS does not correct physical errors but **identifies deviations** for control improvements."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical system (PT) and digital shadow (DS) uses:
  - **Protocol**: **MQTT** for **real-time, low-latency data streaming** of sensor values (current, encoder outputs).
  - **Network Architecture**: **Pub/Sub model** (MQTT broker) to decouple data producers (sensors) and consumers (DS processing components).
  - **Data Format**: Time-series arrays of **floating-point values** (torque **τ**, angular velocity **ω**, current **I_M**).
  - **Integration**: **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** provides a **semantic layer** to link data traces to their **structural/behavioral models** (SysML/Simulink)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital shadow adheres to:
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**: A **UML class diagram** defining concepts like **Purpose**, **DataTrace**, **Source**, **Asset**, and **Processing**.
  - **SysML**: For **structural and behavioral modeling** of the robot’s first axis.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: For **semantic interoperability** and data traceability (aligned with **Industry 4.0 standards**).
  - **MQTT**: For **real-time data streaming** (IETF standard).
  - **Simulink/MATLAB**: For **simulation modeling** (de facto standard in control systems)."
]
